problem id: 37aad918
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  00111111 -> 00001110
  11001101 -> 00001011
  01100100 -> 10001000
  11111000 -> 01110001
  00110000 -> 01100000
  11001110 -> 00011101
  10000110 -> 00001101
  11100000 -> 11000001

query: 01111001
predicted answer: 01100010
